headline: Citi Resumes Coverage of Netflix (NFLX) Stock
summary: Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ:NFLX) is one of the Top Wide Moat Stocks to Buy for Long Term Growth. On March 18, Citi resumed coverage of the company’s stock with a price objective of $115, reiterating a “Buy” rating. The firm believes that the upside is backed by improvement in profitability, pricing power, and enhanced capital returns. The […]

headline: Netflix Live BTS Concert Tests New Unified Tech And Ad Ambitions
summary: Netflix announced a restructuring of its product and technology leadership, bringing product, engineering, and data teams under a single executive. The company is expanding its global live content efforts with its first ever worldwide livestream of a BTS comeback concert. These moves signal a push beyond on demand streaming into large scale live events supported by a more unified technology organization. Netflix, NasdaqGS:NFLX, is trading at $91.82, with a 30 day return of 16.7% and a 3...

headline: Senate Democrats Demand 'Rigorous' FCC Probe Into Foreign Funding Behind Paramount Skydance–Warner Bros. Discovery Deal
